title: Vijay’s ‘Jana Nayagan’ leaked online: Chiranjeevi, Sivakarthikeyan, Khushbu Sundar slam piracy
description: Reacting to the news of Tamil superstar Vijay’s ‘Jana Nayagan’ being leaked online, celebrities such as Chiranjeevi, Khushbu Sundar, and Sivakarthikeyan took to social media to slam piracy
